# Sumer Send
> Enterprise-grade notification gateway designed for developer and business needs in Iraq.

## Core Features
- [Developer Portal](https://sumer-send.vercel.app/): Main entrance and developer dashboard.
- [API Sandbox](https://sumer-send.vercel.app/#sandbox): Interactive playground to test email, SMS, and WhatsApp dispatches.

## Services
- [Email Delivery](https://sumer-send.vercel.app/#features): Transactional email dispatch with customizable SMTP configurations.
- [SMS Gateway](https://sumer-send.vercel.app/#features): Reliable SMS OTP delivery for Zain, AsiaCell, and Korek networks.
- [WhatsApp API](https://sumer-send.vercel.app/#features): Dedicated stateless WhatsApp socket tunnels using Baileys.
